facebook.caption:
1,097 reviews. 4.2 stars. And most tourists never leave the beach to see it.

Phu Quoc National Park is a UNESCO Biosphere Reserve covering the majority of the island. Evergreen forest, rare wildlife, and oceanic species found nowhere else on earth.

Most visitors spend zero hours here. Don't be that person.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Dense forest canopy, rare birds overhead, zero sun loungers in sight. This is the side of Phu Quoc that 1,097 people rated 4.2 stars, and the beach crowd walks straight past. Share with someone planning Vietnam.

instagram.caption:
1,097 reviews. 4.2 stars. Most tourists never leave the beach to find it.

Phu Quoc National Park. UNESCO Biosphere Reserve. Go.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
instagram.video_caption: Evergreen forest. Rare wildlife. Zero crowds. Phu Quoc National Park hits different when you leave the resort behind.

items.placeName: Tree House Phu Quoc Restaurant and Coffee

facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this place in Ông Lang. 4.7 stars. 1,165 reviews. A treehouse restaurant that actually sits in the trees. Tree House Phu Quoc Restaurant and Coffee is on the quieter west coast, away from the resort strip. $15-30 a person for a full meal up in the canopy. Not on most itineraries. Should be on yours. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

facebook.caption:
778 reviews. 4.7 stars. And it sits right on 1 Võ Thị Sáu in Phú Quốc.

Huong Bien Restaurant is the kind of Vietnamese seafood spot that earns that rating one bowl at a time. Fresh catch, local recipes, no resort markup.

If you're skipping the hotel restaurant tonight, this is where the number points you.

items.placeName: Bò Tơ Quán Đảo Phú Quốc

facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 2,332 reviews. At a beef restaurant on Phú Quốc.

Bò Tơ Quán Đảo Phú Quốc on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is pulling numbers most restaurants in Southeast Asia would kill for. Young beef, done right, priced at $15-30 a person. That's a serious meal without a serious bill.

If you're skipping this because you came to an island for seafood, rethink that. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: MEDITERRAN Greek & Italian Restaurant (pizza, pasta & souvlaki)

facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 977 reviews. On an island full of seafood spots.

MEDITERRAN is doing something right. Pizza, pasta, and souvlaki on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, and the crowd keeps coming back. When a Greek-Italian restaurant outranks most places in Phu Quoc, you pay attention.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: Cua 350 – Crab Noodle Soup Phu Quoc

facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 119 reviews. One dish on every table.

Cua 350 is a no-frills bistro on Đ. 30 Tháng 4 that locals keep going back to for one reason: the crab noodle soup hits every time. Thick broth, fresh crab, bowls that disappear fast.

No fancy signage. No tourist menus. Just a 4.9 you have to earn.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the broth pour. That color alone tells you everything. Cua 350 is pulling 4.9 stars in Phu Quoc and the crab noodle soup is why. Find it at 38 Đ. 30 Tháng 4.

facebook.caption:
547 reviews. 4 stars. And most tourists still drive straight past Suoi Tranh Waterfall.

This is one of Phu Quoc's few freshwater spots worth the detour. Trails, natural pools, and actual shade, something the beaches can't give you on a 35°C afternoon.

Coordinates are on the map. Go early. Crowds build by midday.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking into Suoi Tranh Waterfall while everyone else is melting on the beach. 547 people rated this 4 stars. Now you know why. Tag your travel buddy.

instagram.caption:
547 reviews. 4 stars. Still not on most tourist maps.
Suoi Tranh Waterfall is your Phu Quoc cooldown. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Freshwater, real trails, actual shade. Suoi Tranh Waterfall hits different at 35°C.

tiktok.caption: 547 people rated this 4 stars and tourists STILL skip it. Suoi Tranh Waterfall, Phu Quoc. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel #TravelReels
